subject: a093b1df791839bd5
findings: Two self-found-and-fixed defects landed same-train, both red-first: (1) board/fold's Faults/Discoveries were computed every poll and silently discarded, never reaching the wire - TestFoldDiscoveriesAndFaultsSurfaceAsBoardConditions was red on arrival (board=[]), fixed in commit a3fa33d. (2) the plan's own documented quickstart (cd board && go run ./server) puts cwd one level below the repo root, which my first draft's path defaults did not account for - fixed with resolveDefaultRepoRoot, tested both invocation shapes, before it ever shipped. One same-commit schema fix: schema/yard-snapshot.schema.json's dispatchesPayload had no slot for budget_source though board/fold has emitted it since Car 3's fix cycle - trued up in commit 8261ba0. One self-caught documentation omission: the poll-timer ledger row was missing from the state ledger's first pass, caught on re-read and corrected with honest arithmetic in a follow-up commit (099ac49) rather than an amend. Disclosed, non-blocking scope notes: the design's per-position surfacesData flag never landed in the schema/board-defs.json Car 2 shipped, so this car conforms to the landed schema (no such field) per YB-4 rather than inventing one; ageBucketMs's 5-second quantisation bucket is an undictated, disclosed choice; "clock steps back" (the other half of one design failure-table row) was scoped out since plan task 4.1 only names future-dated at as a required fixture; the disconnect gating-matrix row is explicitly marked server-half-only since the client-side 2-missed-heartbeat flip is Car 5's. No plan-vs-code contradiction blocked any task; no HONEST-STOP was needed.
abstract: Car 4 implemented board/store (StoreAdapter, double-decode with D17 unknown-field disclosure, schema-shape validation via the pinned jsonschema/v6, and issue #24's malformed/zoneless-at quarantine), board/assemble (the fold-winner-to-raw-manifest join per design 5.3, YB-14 manifest-membership-collision, DR3-3 subject-namespace-collision), and board/server (the poll loop with skip-not-queue and seq/asOf-excluding change detection, SSE with the schema-tethered event name, YB-15 demoMode proven non-suppressing via fault injection, and one-marshal-path byte identity proven over real HTTP), then landed docs/contracts/state-ledger.md and gating-matrix.md in the same commit as the state they describe. All four tasks are red-first with quoted red-then-green transitions; the wire output validates against schema/yard-snapshot.schema.json under the pinned validator; the server was run live against the real repo store and observed serving all five lanes, real dispatch data, and real disclosed board conditions, then stopped. Final state: go test -count=1 ./... all green across board/board/assemble/board/fold/board/server/board/store, go vet clean, gofmt empty, Pester 235/235 (unchanged baseline), the Node schema probe PASS, and a clean working tree at commit 099ac49 on branch car/board-car4.
